title: Batch Processor
description: Processes large datasets by splitting input into individual items and running each through the pipeline.
Supports JSON arrays, CSV, and line-delimited input formats.
Provides configurable concurrency, rate limiting, retry with exponential backoff, and per-item error isolation.

batch.concurrency.title: Concurrency
batch.concurrency.description: Maximum number of items processed in parallel.

batch.retryCount.title: Retry count
batch.retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts per failed item (0 = no retries).

batch.retryDelayMs.title: Retry delay (ms)
batch.retryDelayMs.description: Base delay between retries in milliseconds. Doubles on each attempt (exponential backoff).

batch.rateLimitPerSecond.title: Rate limit (per second)
batch.rateLimitPerSecond.description: Maximum items dispatched per second (0 = unlimited).

batch.inputFormat.title: Input format
batch.inputFormat.description: How to interpret the input payload.

batch.stopOnFailure.title: Stop on failure
batch.stopOnFailure.description: If true, abort remaining items when any single item fails after exhausting retries.
